description: Execute a complete site identity overhaul following the acquisition by the Wikimedia Foundation. Rebrand the site by setting the Site Title to 'Wikimedia Foundation News', the Tagline to 'News and updates from the Wikimedia Foundation', and the Administration Email Address to 'press@wikimedia.org'. Update the visual identity by setting '/home/ga/Brand_Assets/wikimedia_logo.png' as the Site Logo and '/home/ga/Brand_Assets/wikimedia_icon.png' as the Site Icon. Additionally, create and publish a new page titled 'Press Resources' that contains the wikimedia_logo.png image.

metadata.expected_tagline: News and updates from the Wikimedia Foundation
